$schema._comment: Payment options grouped by Vitesse hub. Single source of truth for the globe UI.
$schema.structure: Top-level `hubs` array. Each hub: identity (id, name, entity, regulator, city, lat, lon), `fundingCurrencies` (the currencies the hub can be funded in), and `supportedCountries` — destinations served by that hub. Each destination lists `paymentMethods` (Domestic Bank Transfer | SWIFT Bank Transfer | Check) with `schemes` populated only for Domestic Bank Transfer, and a `delivery` field (Real Time / Real Time / T+0 / T+0 / T+1 / T+2).
$schema.hubs: 'uk' = Vitesse PSP Ltd (FCA/DNB) · 'us' = Vitesse Trust Company (NYDFS).
$schema.source: Derived from Vitesse Knowledge Hub: Payments (US Hub) and Payments (UK Hub). Region rows expanded per footnotes (SEPA, CEMAC/Central Africa, WAEMU/West Africa, UK Crown Dependencies).
